emails.subject: wine
emails.body: Greg--I know you like good wine and I am selling some of my California Cabs. If you have any interest here is what I have: '92 Silver Oak Napa Valley 2 bottles '93 Silver Oak Napa Valley 17 bottles '94 Silver Oak Napa Valley 3 bottles '91 Silver Oak Alexander Valley 18 bottles '92 Silver Oak Alexander Valley 3 bottles '93 Silver Oak Alexander Valley 12 bottles '94 Silver Oak Alexander Valley 29 bottles '94 Caymus Napa Valley 48 bottles '96 Chateau Montelena 12 bottles All of the wine listed above has been stored in a wine locker at 55 degrees since it was purchased.

emails.subject: RE: wine
emails.body: RE: wine do you have an offer? either individually or on the package? To: Whalley, Greg

emails.subject: RE: wine
emails.body: $75/bottle on the Silver Oak Alexander Valley and the Caymus. $100/bottle on the Silver Oak Napa Valley and Montelena. I'll gladly deliver it to your wine cellar or storage. If you have another price in mind then let me know. To: Leach, Doug
